text: The clinical brightness of the hallway gives way to the inviting glow of neon, beckoning me into a space devoted to research and development. I feel a subtle thrill—there is promise here, a sense that new ideas might spring forth at any moment. Surrounded by curated words and images, my mind tunes to curiosity. I find myself wondering about the interplay between the observed and the observer—am I here simply to witness, or to participate in the endless unfolding of knowledge?
